// FILE: scripts/tactical/overwatch_command.gd
================================================================================
class_name OverwatchCommand
extends TacticalCommand

var direction: Vector3 = Vector3.FORWARD
var cone_degrees: float = 75.0
var minimum_range: float = 1.5
var maximum_range: float = 18.0
var duration: float = 12.0
var reaction_shots: int = 3

func _init(facing: Vector3 = Vector3.FORWARD, cone: float = 75.0, range_max: float = 18.0) -> void:
    direction = facing
    cone_degrees = cone
    maximum_range = range_max
    display_name = "Directional overwatch"
    issued_at = Time.get_ticks_msec() / 1000.0

func validate(context: Dictionary = {}) -> bool:
    if not super.validate(context):
        return false
    if not unit.combat_component.can_fire():
        failure_reason = "No weapon or ammunition available."
        return false
    if unit.suppression_component.state >= SuppressionComponent.SuppressionState.PINNED:
        failure_reason = "Pinned units cannot establish overwatch."
        return false
    return true

func begin(context: Dictionary = {}) -> void:
    super.begin(context)
    unit.overwatch_component.activate(direction, cone_degrees, minimum_range, maximum_range, duration, reaction_shots)

func update(_delta: float, _context: Dictionary = {}) -> bool:
    if not unit.overwatch_component.active:
        succeed()
        return true
    return false

func cancel(context: Dictionary = {}) -> void:
    super.cancel(context)
    if unit != null and is_instance_valid(unit):
        unit.overwatch_component.cancel_overwatch()

================================================================================
// FILE: scripts/tactical/overwatch_component.gd
================================================================================
class_name OverwatchComponent
extends Node

signal overwatch_started(direction: Vector3, cone_degrees: float)
signal overwatch_triggered(target: TacticalUnit)
signal overwatch_ended

var owner_unit: TacticalUnit
var active: bool = false
var direction: Vector3 = Vector3.FORWARD
var cone_degrees: float = 75.0
var minimum_range: float = 1.5
var maximum_range: float = 18.0
var remaining_duration: float = 0.0
var remaining_shots: int = 0
var reaction_delay: float = 0.28
var scan_interval: float = 0.14
var _scan_timer: float = 0.0
var _reaction_timer: float = -1.0
var _pending_target: TacticalUnit

func _ready() -> void:
    owner_unit = get_parent() as TacticalUnit

func activate(facing: Vector3, cone: float, range_min: float, range_max: float, duration: float, shots: int) -> void:
    if owner_unit == null or not owner_unit.suppression_component.can_establish_overwatch():
        return
    direction = facing.normalized() if facing.length_squared() > 0.001 else -owner_unit.global_basis.z
    direction.y = 0.0
    direction = direction.normalized()
    cone_degrees = clampf(cone, 10.0, 180.0)
    minimum_range = maxf(range_min, 0.0)
    maximum_range = maxf(range_max, minimum_range + 0.1)
    remaining_duration = maxf(duration, 0.1)
    remaining_shots = maxi(shots, 1)
    active = true
    _scan_timer = 0.0
    _reaction_timer = -1.0
    _pending_target = null
    owner_unit.state_machine.change_state(&"overwatch")
    overwatch_started.emit(direction, cone_degrees)

func cancel_overwatch() -> void:
    if not active:
        return
    active = false
    _pending_target = null
    _reaction_timer = -1.0
    if owner_unit != null and owner_unit.state_machine.current_state == &"overwatch":
        owner_unit.state_machine.change_state(&"idle")
    overwatch_ended.emit()

func _process(delta: float) -> void:
    if not active or GameFlow.is_tactical_paused:
        return
    remaining_duration -= delta
    if remaining_duration <= 0.0 or remaining_shots <= 0 or not owner_unit.combat_component.can_fire():
        cancel_overwatch()
        return
    if owner_unit.suppression_component.state >= SuppressionComponent.SuppressionState.PINNED:
        cancel_overwatch()
        return
    if owner_unit.combat_component.is_busy():
        return
    if owner_unit.state_machine.current_state != &"overwatch":
        owner_unit.state_machine.change_state(&"overwatch")
    if _pending_target != null:
        _reaction_timer -= delta
        if _reaction_timer <= 0.0:
            _trigger_pending_target()
        return
    _scan_timer -= delta
    if _scan_timer > 0.0:
        return
    _scan_timer = scan_interval
    _pending_target = _find_trigger_target()
    if _pending_target != null:
        _reaction_timer = reaction_delay

func _find_trigger_target() -> TacticalUnit:
    var candidates := get_tree().get_nodes_in_group("enemy_units" if owner_unit.player_controlled else "player_units")
    var best: TacticalUnit
    var best_distance := INF
    var visibility := get_tree().get_first_node_in_group("visibility_managers") as VisibilityManager
    for node in candidates:
        var target := node as TacticalUnit
        if target == null or target.health_component.current_health <= 0.0:
            continue
        var offset := target.global_position - owner_unit.global_position
        offset.y = 0.0
        var distance := offset.length()
        if distance < minimum_range or distance > maximum_range:
            continue
        var angle := rad_to_deg(acos(clampf(direction.dot(offset.normalized()), -1.0, 1.0)))
        if angle > cone_degrees * 0.5:
            continue
        if visibility != null and not visibility.has_line_of_sight(owner_unit, target):
            continue
        if not target.movement_component.moving and target.combat_component.is_busy() == false:
            continue
        if distance < best_distance:
            best = target
            best_distance = distance
    return best

func _trigger_pending_target() -> void:
    var target := _pending_target
    _pending_target = null
    _reaction_timer = -1.0
    if target == null or not is_instance_valid(target):
        return
    if owner_unit.combat_component.begin_attack(target, &"aimed"):
        remaining_shots -= 1
        overwatch_triggered.emit(target)
        EventBus.overwatch_triggered.emit(owner_unit, target)

================================================================================
// FILE: scripts/tactical/perception_component.gd
================================================================================
class_name PerceptionComponent
extends Node

signal visibility_changed(unit: TacticalUnit, is_visible: bool)
signal unit_spotted(unit: TacticalUnit)
signal unit_lost(unit: TacticalUnit)

@export var scan_interval: float = 0.24
var perception_range: float = 20.0
var visible_units: Array[TacticalUnit] = []
var known_positions: Dictionary = {}
var owner_unit: TacticalUnit
var _scan_timer: float = 0.0

func _ready() -> void:
    owner_unit = get_parent() as TacticalUnit

func configure(value: float) -> void:
    perception_range = maxf(value, 0.0)

func _process(delta: float) -> void:
    if GameFlow.is_tactical_paused or owner_unit == null:
        return
    _scan_timer -= delta
    if _scan_timer > 0.0:
        return
    _scan_timer = PerformanceManager.perception_interval(scan_interval)
    _scan()

func can_see(target: TacticalUnit) -> bool:
    if target == null or not is_instance_valid(target):
        return false
    var visibility := get_tree().get_first_node_in_group("visibility_managers") as VisibilityManager
    var effective_range := perception_range
    for node in get_tree().get_nodes_in_group("active_jammers"):
        if node.has_method("interference_at"):
            effective_range *= 1.0 - 0.32 * float(node.interference_at(owner_unit.global_position))
    if visibility != null:
        return visibility.can_see_unit(owner_unit, target, effective_range)
    return owner_unit.global_position.distance_to(target.global_position) <= effective_range

func has_known_position(target: TacticalUnit) -> bool:
    return target != null and known_positions.has(target.get_instance_id())

func get_last_known_position(target: TacticalUnit) -> Vector3:
    if target == null:
        return Vector3.ZERO
    return known_positions.get(target.get_instance_id(), owner_unit.global_position)

func _scan() -> void:
    var next_visible: Array[TacticalUnit] = []
    var group_name := "enemy_units" if owner_unit.player_controlled else "player_units"
    for node in get_tree().get_nodes_in_group(group_name):
        var target := node as TacticalUnit
        if target == null or target.health_component.current_health <= 0.0:
            continue
        if can_see(target):
            next_visible.append(target)
            known_positions[target.get_instance_id()] = target.global_position
            if not visible_units.has(target):
                unit_spotted.emit(target)
                visibility_changed.emit(target, true)
        elif visible_units.has(target):
            unit_lost.emit(target)
            visibility_changed.emit(target, false)
    visible_units = next_visible

extends Node

var enabled: bool = true

// FILE: scripts/tactical/reload_command.gd

class_name ReloadCommand
extends TacticalCommand

func _init() -> void:
    display_name = "Reload"
    issued_at = Time.get_ticks_msec() / 1000.0

func validate(context: Dictionary = {}) -> bool:
    if not super.validate(context):
        return false
    if unit.combat_component.weapon == null:
        failure_reason = "No weapon equipped."
        return false
    if unit.combat_component.ammunition >= unit.combat_component.weapon.magazine_size:
        failure_reason = "Magazine is already full."
        return false
    return true

func begin(context: Dictionary = {}) -> void:
    super.begin(context)
    unit.overwatch_component.cancel_overwatch()
    if not unit.combat_component.begin_reload():
        fail("Reload could not begin.")

func update(_delta: float, _context: Dictionary = {}) -> bool:
    if is_finished():
        return true
    if not unit.combat_component.is_busy():
        succeed()
        return true
    return false

func cancel(context: Dictionary = {}) -> void:
    super.cancel(context)
    if unit != null and is_instance_valid(unit):
        unit.combat_component.cancel_action()

================================================================================
// FILE: scripts/tactical/selection_manager.gd
================================================================================
class_name SelectionManager
extends Node

signal changed(units: Array[TacticalUnit])

var selected_units: Array[TacticalUnit] = []

func _ready() -> void:
    add_to_group("selection_managers")

func clear() -> void:
    for unit in selected_units:
        if is_instance_valid(unit):
            unit.set_selected(false)
    selected_units.clear()
    _emit_changed()

func select_only(unit: TacticalUnit) -> void:
    clear()
    if unit != null:
        selected_units.append(unit)
        unit.set_selected(true)
    _emit_changed()

func add(unit: TacticalUnit) -> void:
    if unit == null or selected_units.has(unit):
        return
    selected_units.append(unit)
    unit.set_selected(true)
    _emit_changed()

func remove(unit: TacticalUnit) -> void:
    if not selected_units.has(unit):
        return
    selected_units.erase(unit)
    unit.set_selected(false)
    _emit_changed()

func toggle(unit: TacticalUnit) -> void:
    if selected_units.has(unit):
        remove(unit)
    else:
        add(unit)

func select_many(units: Array[TacticalUnit], additive: bool = false) -> void:
    if not additive:
        clear()
    for unit in units:
        add(unit)
    _emit_changed()

func average_position() -> Vector3:
    if selected_units.is_empty():
        return Vector3.ZERO
    var total := Vector3.ZERO
    var count := 0
    for unit in selected_units:
        if is_instance_valid(unit):
            total += unit.global_position
            count += 1
    return total / max(1, count)

func _emit_changed() -> void:
    selected_units = selected_units.filter(func(unit: TacticalUnit) -> bool: return is_instance_valid(unit))
    changed.emit(selected_units)
    EventBus.selection_changed.emit(selected_units)

class_name StatusEffectComponent
extends Node

var active_effects: Dictionary = {}

func add_effect(definition: StatusEffectDefinition, stacks: int = 1) -> void:
    if definition == null:
        return
    var existing: Dictionary = active_effects.get(definition.id, {"definition": definition, "stacks": 0, "remaining": 0.0})
    existing["stacks"] = mini(definition.maximum_stacks, int(existing["stacks"]) + stacks)
    existing["remaining"] = definition.duration_seconds
    active_effects[definition.id] = existing

// FILE: scripts/tactical/suppress_command.gd

class_name SuppressCommand
extends TacticalCommand

var target_position: Vector3
var radius: float = 3.25
var fire_mode_id: StringName = &"suppressive"

func _init(position: Vector3 = Vector3.ZERO, area_radius: float = 3.25) -> void:
    target_position = position
    radius = area_radius
    display_name = "Suppress area"
    issued_at = Time.get_ticks_msec() / 1000.0

func validate(context: Dictionary = {}) -> bool:
    if not super.validate(context):
        return false
    if not target_position.is_finite():
        failure_reason = "Suppression target is invalid."
        return false
    if not unit.combat_component.can_use_fire_mode(fire_mode_id):
        failure_reason = "Suppressive fire is unavailable."
        return false
    return true

func begin(context: Dictionary = {}) -> void:
    super.begin(context)
    unit.overwatch_component.cancel_overwatch()
    if not unit.begin_suppression(target_position, radius):
        fail("Suppressive fire could not begin.")

func update(_delta: float, _context: Dictionary = {}) -> bool:
    if is_finished():
        return true
    if not unit.combat_component.is_busy():
        succeed()
        return true
    return false

func cancel(context: Dictionary = {}) -> void:
    super.cancel(context)
    if unit != null and is_instance_valid(unit):
        unit.combat_component.cancel_action()

================================================================================
// FILE: scripts/tactical/suppression_component.gd
================================================================================
class_name SuppressionComponent
extends Node

enum SuppressionState { CALM, PRESSURED, SUPPRESSED, PINNED, BROKEN }

signal suppression_changed(value: float, state: SuppressionState)
signal state_changed(previous: SuppressionState, current: SuppressionState)

@export var passive_decay_per_second: float = 2.2
var resistance: float = 20.0
var suppression: float = 0.0
var state: SuppressionState = SuppressionState.CALM
var owner_unit: TacticalUnit

func _ready() -> void:
    owner_unit = get_parent() as TacticalUnit

func configure(value: float) -> void:
    resistance = maxf(value, 1.0)

func add_suppression(amount: float) -> void:
    suppression = maxf(0.0, suppression + amount)
    _update_state()

func clear_suppression(amount: float) -> void:
    suppression = maxf(0.0, suppression - amount)
    _update_state()

func _process(delta: float) -> void:
    if GameFlow.is_tactical_paused or suppression <= 0.0:
        return
    var decay := passive_decay_per_second
    if owner_unit != null and not owner_unit.movement_component.moving:
        decay *= 1.25
    clear_suppression(decay * delta)

func get_accuracy_multiplier() -> float:
    match state:
        SuppressionState.PRESSURED:
            return 0.88
        SuppressionState.SUPPRESSED:
            return 0.68
        SuppressionState.PINNED:
            return 0.42
        SuppressionState.BROKEN:
            return 0.24
        _:
            return 1.0

func get_movement_multiplier() -> float:
    match state:
        SuppressionState.SUPPRESSED:
            return 0.82
        SuppressionState.PINNED:
            return 0.46
        SuppressionState.BROKEN:
            return 0.62
        _:
            return 1.0

func can_establish_overwatch() -> bool:
    return state < SuppressionState.PINNED

func _update_state() -> void:
    var ratio := suppression / resistance
    var next_state := SuppressionState.CALM
    if ratio >= 3.0:
        next_state = SuppressionState.BROKEN
    elif ratio >= 2.0:
        next_state = SuppressionState.PINNED
    elif ratio >= 1.0:
        next_state = SuppressionState.SUPPRESSED
    elif ratio >= 0.4:
        next_state = SuppressionState.PRESSURED
    if next_state != state:
        var previous := state
        state = next_state
        state_changed.emit(previous, state)
        EventBus.suppression_state_changed.emit(owner_unit, state)
    suppression_changed.emit(suppression, state)

================================================================================
// FILE: scripts/tactical/tactical_command.gd
================================================================================
class_name TacticalCommand
extends RefCounted

enum CommandState { QUEUED, READY, RUNNING, SUCCEEDED, FAILED, CANCELLED }

var unit: TacticalUnit
var issued_at: float = 0.0
var synchronization_group: StringName
var display_name: String = "Command"
var state: CommandState = CommandState.QUEUED
var failure_reason: String = ""
var release_delay: float = 0.0
var metadata: Dictionary = {}

func validate(_context: Dictionary = {}) -> bool:
    failure_reason = ""
    if unit == null or not is_instance_valid(unit):
        failure_reason = "Unit is unavailable."
        return false
    if unit.health_component != null and unit.health_component.current_health <= 0.0:
        failure_reason = "Unit is incapacitated."
        return false
    return true

func mark_ready() -> void:
    state = CommandState.READY

func begin(_context: Dictionary = {}) -> void:
    state = CommandState.RUNNING

func update(_delta: float, _context: Dictionary = {}) -> bool:
    succeed()
    return true

func succeed() -> void:
    if state != CommandState.CANCELLED and state != CommandState.FAILED:
        state = CommandState.SUCCEEDED

func fail(reason: String) -> void:
    failure_reason = reason
    state = CommandState.FAILED

func cancel(_context: Dictionary = {}) -> void:
    state = CommandState.CANCELLED

func is_finished() -> bool:
    return state in [CommandState.SUCCEEDED, CommandState.FAILED, CommandState.CANCELLED]

================================================================================
// FILE: scripts/tactical/tactical_estimator.gd
================================================================================
class_name TacticalEstimator
extends RefCounted

static func estimate_attack(attacker: TacticalUnit, target: TacticalUnit, fire_mode_id: StringName) -> Dictionary:
    if attacker == null or target == null or attacker.combat_component == null:
        return {}
    var mode := attacker.combat_component.get_fire_mode(fire_mode_id)
    if mode == null or attacker.combat_component.weapon == null:
        return {}
    var weapon := attacker.combat_component.weapon
    var chance := attacker.combat_component.calculate_hit_chance(target, mode)
    var distance := attacker.global_position.distance_to(target.global_position)
    var expected_hits := chance * mode.projectile_count
    var expected_damage := expected_hits * weapon.damage
    var suppression := weapon.suppression_strength * mode.suppression_multiplier * mode.projectile_count
    var visibility := attacker.get_tree().get_first_node_in_group("visibility_managers") as VisibilityManager
    var cover_multiplier := 1.0
    var smoke_multiplier := 1.0
    var line_of_sight := true
    if visibility != null:
        cover_multiplier = visibility.get_cover_accuracy_multiplier(attacker, target)
        smoke_multiplier = visibility.get_smoke_visibility_factor(
            attacker.global_position + Vector3.UP,
            target.global_position + Vector3.UP
        )
        line_of_sight = visibility.has_line_of_sight(attacker, target)
    return {
        "action": String(fire_mode_id).replace("_", " ").capitalize(),
        "hit_chance": chance,
        "hit_percent": roundi(chance * 100.0),
        "expected_damage": expected_damage,
        "expected_hits": expected_hits,
        "suppression": suppression,
        "distance": distance,
        "range_state": _range_state(distance, weapon.optimal_range, weapon.maximum_range),
        "cover_multiplier": cover_multiplier,
        "smoke_multiplier": smoke_multiplier,
        "line_of_sight": line_of_sight,
        "ammo_cost": mode.ammunition_cost,
        "projectiles": mode.projectile_count,
        "confidence": confidence_label(chance),
    }

static func estimate_move(unit: TacticalUnit, destination: Vector3, stance: int) -> Dictionary:
    if unit == null:
        return {}
    var distance := unit.global_position.distance_to(destination)
    var speed := unit.movement_component.get_speed_for_stance(stance) if unit.movement_component != null else 1.0
    return {
        "action": "Move",
        "distance": distance,
        "seconds": distance / maxf(speed, 0.01),
        "stance": MovementComponent.MovementStance.keys()[clampi(stance, 0, 2)].capitalize(),
        "valid": unit.can_move_to(destination),
    }

static func estimate_area_suppression(attacker: TacticalUnit, position: Vector3, radius: float) -> Dictionary:
    if attacker == null or attacker.combat_component.weapon == null:
        return {}
    var affected := 0
    for node in attacker.get_tree().get_nodes_in_group("enemy_units" if attacker.player_controlled else "player_units"):
        var target := node as TacticalUnit
        if target != null and target.global_position.distance_to(position) <= radius:
            affected += 1
    var mode := attacker.combat_component.get_fire_mode(&"suppressive")
    var amount := attacker.combat_component.weapon.suppression_strength
    if mode != null:
        amount *= mode.suppression_multiplier * mode.projectile_count
    return {
        "action": "Suppress Area",
        "radius": radius,
        "affected_units": affected,
        "suppression": amount,
        "ammo_cost": mode.ammunition_cost if mode != null else 0,
    }

static func confidence_label(chance: float) -> String:
    if chance >= 0.8:
        return "Excellent"
    if chance >= 0.62:
        return "Good"
    if chance >= 0.42:
        return "Risky"
    if chance >= 0.2:
        return "Poor"
    return "Blocked"

static func pure_hit_chance(
        base_accuracy: float,
        mode_multiplier: float,
        range_factor: float,
        suppression_factor: float,
        movement_factor: float,
        cover_factor: float,
        smoke_factor: float) -> float:
    return clampf(
        base_accuracy
        * mode_multiplier
        * range_factor
        * suppression_factor
        * movement_factor
        * cover_factor
        * smoke_factor,
        0.03,
        0.97
    )

static func _range_state(distance: float, optimal_range: float, maximum_range: float) -> String:
    if distance > maximum_range:
        return "Out of range"
    if distance <= optimal_range * 0.55:
        return "Close"
    if distance <= optimal_range:
        return "Optimal"
    return "Long"

================================================================================
// FILE: scripts/tactical/tactical_hud.gd
================================================================================
class_name TacticalHUD
extends CanvasLayer

const ICON_ROOT := "res://assets/ui/icons/"

@onready var root: Node3D = get_parent()
@onready var input_controller: TacticalInputController = root.get_node("TacticalInputController")
@onready var selection_manager: SelectionManager = root.get_node("SelectionManager")

var interface_root: Control
var pause_label: Label
var selection_label: Label
var stance_label: Label
var sync_toggle: CheckButton
var mode_label: Label
var status_label: Label
var target_preview_label: Label
var queue_list: ItemList
var queue_title: Label
var squad_box: VBoxContainer
var selection_details: RichTextLabel
var objective_label: Label
var crisis_label: Label
var minimap: MinimapWidget
var notification_feed: NotificationFeed
var extract_button: Button
var _status_timer: float = 0.0
var _notification_text: String = ""
var _notification_until: float = 0.0
var _target_preview: Dictionary = {}
var _squad_buttons: Dictionary = {}

func _ready() -> void:
    layer = 40
    _hide_legacy_layout()
    _build_interface()
    selection_manager.changed.connect(_on_selection_changed)
    EventBus.tactical_pause_changed.connect(_on_pause_changed)
    EventBus.synchronization_disrupted.connect(_on_synchronization_disrupted)
    EventBus.overwatch_triggered.connect(_on_overwatch_triggered)
    EventBus.objective_changed.connect(_on_objective_changed)
    EventBus.crisis_started.connect(_on_crisis_started)
    EventBus.crisis_resolved.connect(_on_crisis_resolved)
    EventBus.mission_extraction_available.connect(_on_extraction_available)
    EventBus.shot_resolved.connect(_on_shot_resolved)
    EventBus.unit_died.connect(_on_unit_died)
    EventBus.interaction_performed.connect(_on_interaction_performed)
    input_controller.target_preview_changed.connect(set_target_preview)
    set_stance(input_controller.current_stance)
    set_action_mode(input_controller.action_mode)
    sync_toggle.button_pressed = input_controller.synchronized_group_movement
    _on_selection_changed(selection_manager.selected_units)
    _on_pause_changed(GameFlow.is_tactical_paused)
    _refresh_objectives()
    call_deferred("_hide_standalone_objective_hud")

func _process(delta: float) -> void:
    _status_timer -= delta
    if _status_timer <= 0.0:
        _status_timer = PerformanceManager.ui_refresh_interval()
        _refresh_selected_unit_status()
        _refresh_queue_panel()
        _refresh_squad_roster()
        _refresh_objectives()

func set_stance(value: int) -> void:
    var names := ["Walk", "Jog", "Sprint"]
    if stance_label != null:
        stance_label.text = "STANCE  %s" % names[clampi(value, 0, names.size() - 1)].to_upper()

func set_action_mode(value: int) -> void:
    if mode_label == null:
        return
    var names := ["Select / Move", "Aimed Fire", "Burst Fire", "Suppress Area", "Overwatch Cone", "Smoke", "EMP", "Interact", "Field Medkit"]
    mode_label.text = "MODE  %s" % names[clampi(value, 0, names.size() - 1)].to_upper()
    _target_preview.clear()
    _refresh_target_preview()

func set_interaction_action(action_id: StringName) -> void:
    if mode_label == null:
        return
    var label := "Context Auto" if action_id == &"" else String(action_id).replace("_", " ").capitalize()
    mode_label.text = "MODE  INTERACT — %s" % label.to_upper()

func set_target_preview(payload: Dictionary) -> void:
    _target_preview = payload.duplicate(true)
    _refresh_target_preview()

func _hide_legacy_layout() -> void:
    var top_bar := get_node_or_null("TopBar") as Control
    var command_bar := get_node_or_null("CommandBar") as Control
    if top_bar != null:
        top_bar.visible = false
    if command_bar != null:
        command_bar.visible = false

func _hide_standalone_objective_hud() -> void:
    var standalone := root.get_node_or_null("MissionObjectiveHUD") as CanvasLayer
    if standalone != null:
        standalone.visible = false

func _build_interface() -> void:
    interface_root = Control.new()
    interface_root.name = "ResponsiveInterface"
    interface_root.set_anchors_and_offsets_preset(Control.PRESET_FULL_RECT)
    interface_root.mouse_filter = Control.MOUSE_FILTER_IGNORE
    var interface_theme := Theme.new()
    interface_theme.default_font_size = maxi(11, roundi(14.0 * float(SettingsManager.get_value(&"ui_scale", 1.0))))
    interface_root.theme = interface_theme
    add_child(interface_root)
    _build_top_bar()
    _build_left_stack()
    _build_right_stack()
    _build_bottom_command_dock()

    var margin := MarginContainer.new()
    margin.set_anchors_preset(Control.PRESET_TOP_WIDE)

    margin.add_child(panel)
